statement: Carrier Admissibility implies Registered Subdominant Normal Form.
formal_shape: forall C admissible, exists r in R, forall b lambda, exists injective phi_{b,lambda}: T_C(b,lambda) -> T_r(b,lambda)
capacity_shape: forall C admissible, exists r in R, forall b lambda, |T_C(b,lambda)| <= |T_r(b,lambda)|
boundary: Weakest missing lemma statement only; not a proof.
